Dashboard.title: Morning Routine
Dashboard.quote: "The morning breeze has secrets to tell you. Don't go back to sleep."

Categories.title: Data Sources
Categories.desc: Manage and order the content for your morning routine.
Categories.errorInvalidFbUrl: URL must be a valid Facebook link

Settings.title: Settings
Settings.cronEnabledDesc: Automatically sync your morning brief at a fixed time every day.
Settings.cronTimeDesc: The system will collect data and generate your audio brief at this time.
Settings.voiceSelectDesc: Choose a voice from the available voices on your device and browser.
Settings.voiceTestSample: Good morning! This is a preview of your selected voice for Morning Routine.
Settings.noVoicesAvailable: No voices available on this device.

Onboarding.welcomeSubtitle: Your personal morning briefing, curated every day.
Onboarding.welcomeDesc: Morning Routine collects your schedule, weather, and news — then reads it all aloud so you can start the day informed, without touching your phone.
Onboarding.voiceDesc: Select the AI voice that will read your morning briefing each day.
Onboarding.voiceTestSample: Good morning! The weather today is clear and sunny. Your first meeting starts at 9 AM.
Onboarding.noVoicesAvailable: No voices found on this device.
Onboarding.categoryDesc: Select what information you want in your morning brief. You can always change this later.
Onboarding.finishDesc: Your morning routine is ready. See you tomorrow morning.

Login.title: Welcome back
Login.subtitle: Sign in to sync your morning routine.
